rules: No Inter, Roboto, or Open Sans for headings.
Variable weights for emphasis rather than just bolding.
Headings strictly use tight letter spacing.
Use small uppercase tracking for overlines, metric labels, and table headers.
Avoid pure #000000 or #FFFFFF if possible; surfaces are slightly warm off-white, backgrounds are warm sand.
Hover states must be lighter/darker hues of active state, not generic gray.
Accent positive for live appreciation, accent negative for expenses.

surfaces_and_spacing.dashboard_cards: Flat solid background, 1px subtle border (border-[#E6E2D8]), no shadow. Max 8px border-radius.

layout_grid.alignment: Every pixel must be utilized, h-full on children.

components.buttons: Rounded-md (max 8px radius). Primary buttons use #2C4C3B with crisp white text. Hover uses #1F362A.
components.charts: Shadcn Recharts customized with organic palette (Primary green and Terracotta).
components.tables: Clean, dense rows, uppercase tracked column headers, subtle row borders.

images.description: White concrete modern townhouse exterior daytime
Blue and white concrete modern townhouse
Indian street landscape for local context or subtle header texture

motion.entrance: staggered fade-in and slight slide-up for dashboard widgets
motion.rules: Respect prefers-reduced-motion. Animations for feedback, not distraction.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure minimum 4.5:1 ratio for normal text. Use APCA preferred.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements must have data-testid (e.g., data-testid='export-csv-button').

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a 'Control Room' style dashboard displaying financial metrics for two townhouses in Pattukottai.
Apply 'Work Sans' font for headings and 'Manrope' for body text (import via Google Fonts).
Use Phosphor icons (@phosphor-icons/react) for dashboard iconography.
Implement Shadcn charts to show income vs. expenses, and property appreciation.
Use a top navigation bar with clear title and user actions (Export Data, Settings).
Avoid the default 'tech-SaaS' look. The aesthetic should feel grounded, wealthy, and stable (Archetype 1: Organic & Earthy).
Never use generic card drop shadows, use 1px borders with warm #E6E2D8 tone.
Ensure the dashboard uses the provided real-world image URLs for the property thumbnails, never placeholders.
